en.extract:
The rufous-backed honeyeater (Ptiloprora guisei) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.
It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''rufous-backed honeyeater''' ('''''Ptiloprora guisei''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Papua New Guinea]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
